creator: shoesoft@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 162142
diff for update from 4.4 to 4.6.2

Attached is a patch to update scid to 4.6.2.

The build system is not very flexible, e.g., no DESTDIR support. There have been some changes since 4.4 that needed manual fixing. I hope I didn't break anything.

Tested using poudriere testport on 10.2-RELEASE amd64.
